description: CompositionGrey top made of a cotton blend fabric, has a V-neck, and full sleeves with ribbed cuffs and hemFittingComfortWash careWarm machine wash or hand wash separately in mild detergentDo not bleach or wringDry in shadeMedium iron, but do not iron on printThis easy-to-wear basic top from jealous 21 adds understated class to your wardrobe. Show off your elegant side in this fashionably tailored top and revel in the soft comfort of the fabric. Pair it with a matching scarf and richly hued denims.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 5'8' and chest 33"
